About

I am a researcher working at the intersection of educational data mining, machine learning, and AI in education. My work focuses on developing data-analytical methods and systems for early identification of at-risk students, adaptive AI tutoring, and learning analytics in higher education.

Educational Data Mining Learning Analytics Machine Learning NLP Large Language Models GenAI
